labels.name: External

body:
**Version Number:** 9.3.53-0 **Reproducible in staging?:** Yes **Reproducible in production?:** Yes **Email or phone of affected tester (no customers):** **Issue reported by:** Internal **Bug source:** Related to https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues/87202 ## Action Performed: **Precondition:** - A workspace with Distance rates and Taxes enabled - Track tax enabled in Distance settings - A distance rate with a non-zero tax rate (e.g. 5%) and a reclaimable amount configured 1. Go to self DM 2. Click + > Track distance > Manual 3. Enter a distance amount and proceed 4. On the confirm page, select the rate with the 5% tax 5. Submit the expense 6. View the created expense ## Expected Result: The created expense should show the correct tax amount based on the configured tax rate on the distance rate. ## Actual Result: The tax amount on the created expense is 0, even though the correct tax rate was selected. Note: The confirmation page shows the correct tax rate/amount after https://github.com/Expensify/App/pull/87237, but the persisted expense still has a 0 tax amount. ## Workaround: Unknown ## Platforms: - [ ] Android: App - [ ] Android: mWeb Chrome - [ ] iOS: App - [ ] iOS: mWeb Safari - [ ] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [x] Windows: Chrome - [x] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos See comment: https://github.com/Expensify/App/pull/87237#issuecomment-4198595701

title: [$250] [EX 174] - "Earn up to 2% cash back on all US purchases" banner is displayed on member side

labels.name: External
labels.description: Added to denote the issue can be worked on by a contributor

labels.name: Daily
labels.description: KSv2

labels.name: Help Wanted
labels.description: Apply this label when an issue is open to proposals by contributors

labels.name: Bug
labels.description: Something is broken. Auto assigns a BugZero manager.

body:
If you haven’t already, check out our [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/Expensify/ReactNativeChat/blob/main/contributingGuides/CONTRIBUTING.md) for onboarding and email contributors@expensify.com to request to join our Slack channel! ___ **Version Number:** v9.3.53-1 **Reproducible in staging?:** Yes **Reproducible in production?:** Yes **If this was caught during regression testing, add the test name, ID and link from BrowserStack:** https://test-management.browserstack.com/projects/2219752/test-runs/TR-16388/93408141/1309881860?sort=%2Bidentifier **Email or phone of affected tester (no customers):** poipio514+ab1@gmail.com **Issue reported by:** Applause Internal Team **Bug source:** Regression TC Execution **Device used:** Windows 11 / Chrome **App Component:** Other ## Action Performed: Preconditions: 1. If tester is not from US, use US VPN. 2. Test on production. 3. Open an incognito window 4. Navigate to new.expensify.com (NewDot) (Very important) 5. Open console > Application > Cookies 6. Set the following cookies (check video for instructions) 7. lc-qa-mocked= 1, lc-debug=1 8. Refresh the page Steps: 1. Sign in with an account with expired free trial and control workspace 2. Navigate to Workspace settings and add a member (Should have access to the account) 3. Navigate to Reports > Insights 4.
